Fearful social sentiment score -1.3 across semiconductor and AI names

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $415.17 down 6.69% yesterday trading below EMA21 at $416.14 but above EMA50 at $395.58 with EMA200 rising at $331.63. Stage2 5/7 and RS 70.7 show UPTREND structure yet fearful social mood caps near-term conviction. Broad semiconductor selloff amid AI trade de-risking and macro concerns drove the move.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM은 $415.17에 마감하며 전일 6.69% 하락했고 EMA21 $416.14 아래 EMA50 $395.58 위 EMA200 $331.63 상승 중이다. Stage2 5/7 RS 70.7 UPTREND 구조이나 fearful 심리로 모멘텀 제한적이다. AI 무역 디리스킹과 거시 우려 속 반도체 광범위 매도세가 촉매로 작용했다.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Sustained trade below EMA21 at $416.14 risks deeper pullback toward EMA50 $395.58

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA21 $416.14 회복 시 52주 고점 $450.29 도전 가능

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $205.10 down 6.20% yesterday sitting below EMA21 at $214.54 yet above EMA50 at $206.64 with EMA200 at $186.42 rising. Stage2 5/7 RS 56.8 maintains UPTREND structure but fearful social sentiment weighs on momentum. Massive hyperscaler GPU rental deals and RTX 50 series promotion underscore sustained AI demand.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $593.00 down 5.51% yesterday trading below all EMAs with EMA21 at $616.43 EMA50 at $622.47 and EMA200 at $642.90. Stage2 1/7 and RS 15.3 with monthly DOWNTREND signal structural weakness. Dilution fears on FT report of potential tens-of-billions equity raise for AI capex triggered the decline.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $391.00 down 6.56% yesterday trading below EMA21 at $417.04 and EMA50 at $408.06 yet above EMA200 at $396.39 with volume contraction. Stage2 5/7 RS 28.1 shows DISTRIBUTION structure with neutral monthly candle. Core Tesla community stays bullish on robotaxi Optimus and energy despite weakness tied to SpaceX capital rotation.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $135.53 down 4.35% yesterday trading below all EMAs with EMA21 at $141.63 EMA50 at $142.54 and EMA200 at $147.49. symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $864.01 down 13.25% yesterday trading above all EMAs with EMA21 at $845.31 EMA50 at $687.59 and EMA200 at $418.43 rising on volume contraction. Stage2 6/7 RS 100.0 shows strong UPTREND structure near 52-week high despite fearful mood. Sharp sell-off in MU and semis triggered by Broadcom's softer AI outlook and rate-hike fears from strong jobs data.
